arts.ttl: Why Hansi Flick & Barcelona staff will be closely watching Lamine Yamal vs Denmark
arts.sum: The coaching staff at La Liga giants Barcelona will be keeping a watchful eye on the upcoming Nations League meeting between Spain and Denmark. This comes owing to the expected…

arts.ttl: Spain manager issues Lamine Yamal warning over Barcelona rise
arts.sum: Spain's national team manager Luis de la Fuente has warned Lamine Yamal not to rush the acceleration of his career after the 17-year-old rose to fame during Euro 2024. He's already registered five goals in 11 appearances during the 2024/25 campaign and is set to play an integral role in Spain's UEFA Nations League fixtures after featuring against Serbia and Switzerland in September.

arts.ttl: Spain predicted XI vs Denmark: Injury-hit Spain set to display new-look lineup

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella reveals turning point in Chelsea career
arts.sum: Asked to identify the turning point in his career, Cucurella confessed three months on the sidelines with an ankle injury last season gave him the chance to really get his head around what was going on. Marc Cucurella has admitted time on the sidelines with an ankle injury helped him turn his Chelsea career around.

arts.ttl: Milan eye two Denmark internationals ahead of January transfer window
arts.sum: Milan are keeping tabs on Denmark internationals Andreas Skov Olsen and Morten Frendrup ahead of...

arts.ttl: Spain vs Denmark: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: European champions Spain continue their 2024/25 UEFA Nations League campaign on Saturday evening when they host Denmark. Spain have a whole host of their Euro 2024-winning squad unavailable to them, including Rodri, Dani Carvajal, Dani Olmo and Nico Williams who all miss out through injury.

arts.ttl: How to Spain vs Denmark FOR FREE: TV channel and live stream for Nations League game today
arts.sum: Holders looking for top spot in League A Group 4

arts.ttl: Spain boss: Clubs' responsibility to rest players
arts.sum: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente says the onus should be on clubs to rest players, not national teams, amid an increase in injuries across European football.

arts.ttl: Will Real Madrid enter the January transfer window to find a substitute for Carvajal?
arts.sum: It couldn’t have been a more untimely setback for the player, who is in the final year of his contract - and Ancelotti, who is left without his first-choice right-back as Madrid battle for seven trophies this season for the first time in club history. The first message sent out by the club was unequivocal: “ There will be no signings in the winter transfer market, that’s why Lucas Vázquez was renewed and there is full confidence in him.”

arts.ttl: AC Milan’s January transfer plans: From Chukwuemeka to a “New Morata”
arts.sum: AC Milan are looking to bolster their squad in the January transfer window after a challenging start to the season. Currently sitting sixth in Serie A with 11 points from seven matches, the Rossoneri are keen to strengthen key areas to support new manager Paulo Fonseca’s vision. Calciomercato report that the club’s primary focus appears to be on the right-back position, with captain Davide Calabria’s future uncertain. With his contract expiring in June 2025 and renewal talks stalled, Milan is exploring alternatives.
